steps.title: Interpret the equation
steps.content: The equation is $$5x+24y=4{,}529.$$ The total tree count (4,529) equals (5 hectares)$\cdot x$ + (24 hectares)$\cdot y$. For units to work out as trees, $x$ and $y$ must each have units of trees per hectare. The coefficient $5$ comes from the industrial park, so $x$ is the average trees per hectare in the industrial park.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A: Average trees per hectare in the industrial park — matches the analysis (5 hectares $\cdot$ trees/hectare = total industrial-park trees).
  • B: Average trees per hectare in the neighborhood — that role is played by $y$ (paired with 24 hectares), not $x$.
  • C: Total trees in the industrial park — that would be $5x$, not $x$ itself.
  • D: Total trees in the neighborhood — that would be $24y$, not $x$.
A is correct.
